summary: Live global lifecycle limits and registered-Function precedence with 25 active validations and one existing cart transform.

userErrors.message: Cannot have more than 25 active validation functions.
Could not enable cart transform because it is already registered
An API client cannot have more than 1 cart transform functions per shop

notes.authoritativeCatalogs: The replay starts cold and can reach the three Shopify payloads only by consuming the exact complete validation and cart-transform catalog reads recorded in upstreamCalls.
notes.cleanup: The script clears the disposable lifecycle catalogs before setup and deletes every created Validation and CartTransform in finally.
